headline: Forget CrowdStrike. For 0.59% This Fund Owns It Plus 30 Cybersecurity Rivals
summary: Holders of CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) own the household name in cybersecurity, and the stock has rewarded that conviction with a 45.26% year-to-date gain through June 23. The catch is concentration. A single Falcon sensor incident in July 2024 still drags litigation costs across CrowdStrike’s results. headline: Fortinet Appoints Public Sector Leader and Tech Executive Derek Kan to Its Board of Directors
summary: SUNNYVALE, Calif., June 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Fortinet® (Nasdaq: FTNT), the global cybersecurity leader driving the convergence of networking and security, today announced the appointment of Derek Kan to its board of directors, contributing his deep expertise in scaling technology businesses, deploying AI, and governing large-scale, capital-intensive operations across the public and private sectors.
